# Agentic Masterpiece

> Agent 应用工程师的渐进式理论教材与工程知识库

## 教材

- [01 · 如何使用这套教材](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/00-%E5%AF%BC%E8%AF%BB/01-%E5%A6%82%E4%BD%95%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%99%E5%A5%97%E6%95%99%E6%9D%90.md)
- [02 · 知识地图与学习门禁](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/00-%E5%AF%BC%E8%AF%BB/02-%E7%9F%A5%E8%AF%86%E5%9C%B0%E5%9B%BE%E4%B8%8E%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81.md)
- [03 · 术语与边界](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/00-%E5%AF%BC%E8%AF%BB/03-%E6%9C%AF%E8%AF%AD%E4%B8%8E%E8%BE%B9%E7%95%8C.md)

- [01 · 概率、信息量与采样](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/01-%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%A6%E4%B8%8E%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%9B%B4%E8%A7%89/01-%E6%A6%82%E7%8E%87-%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E9%87%8F%E4%B8%8E%E9%87%87%E6%A0%B7.md)
- [02 · 向量、Embedding 与相似度](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/01-%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%A6%E4%B8%8E%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%9B%B4%E8%A7%89/02-%E5%90%91%E9%87%8F-%E5%B5%8C%E5%85%A5%E4%B8%8E%E7%9B%B8%E4%BC%BC%E5%BA%A6.md)
- [03 · 训练、泛化与分布偏移](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/01-%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%A6%E4%B8%8E%E6%9C%BA%E5%99%A8%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E7%9B%B4%E8%A7%89/03-%E8%AE%AD%E7%BB%83-%E6%B3%9B%E5%8C%96%E4%B8%8E%E5%88%86%E5%B8%83%E5%81%8F%E7%A7%BB.md)

- [02 · Transformer、Attention 与 KV Cache](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/02-LLM%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86/02-Transformer-Attention%E4%B8%8EKV-Cache.md)
- [03 · 预训练、后训练与推理](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/02-LLM%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86/03-%E9%A2%84%E8%AE%AD%E7%BB%83-%E5%90%8E%E8%AE%AD%E7%BB%83%E4%B8%8E%E6%8E%A8%E7%90%86.md)
- [04 · 上下文窗口、采样与能力边界](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/02-LLM%E5%B7%A5%E4%BD%9C%E5%8E%9F%E7%90%86/04-%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87%E7%AA%97%E5%8F%A3-%E9%87%87%E6%A0%B7%E4%B8%8E%E8%83%BD%E5%8A%9B%E8%BE%B9%E7%95%8C.md)

- [02 · 结果、轨迹与 Trace](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/03-%E8%AF%84%E6%B5%8B%E4%B8%8E%E5%AE%9E%E9%AA%8C%E7%A7%91%E5%AD%A6/02-%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C-%E8%BD%A8%E8%BF%B9%E4%B8%8ETrace.md)

- [04 · JSON Schema 基础](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/04-%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%8EAgent%E5%86%85%E6%A0%B8/04-JSON-Schema%E5%9F%BA%E7%A1%80.md)
- [05 · 结构化输出与工具调用](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/04-%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%8EAgent%E5%86%85%E6%A0%B8/05-%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84%E5%8C%96%E8%BE%93%E5%87%BA%E4%B8%8E%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8.md)
- [06 · Agent Loop 与状态机](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/04-%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%8EAgent%E5%86%85%E6%A0%B8/06-Agent-Loop%E4%B8%8E%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E6%9C%BA.md)
- [07 · 架构模式与多 Agent 边界](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/04-%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%8EAgent%E5%86%85%E6%A0%B8/07-%E6%9E%B6%E6%9E%84%E6%A8%A1%E5%BC%8F%E4%B8%8E%E5%A4%9AAgent%E8%BE%B9%E7%95%8C.md)
- [08 · 框架与 SDK 学习优先级](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/04-%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E4%B8%8EAgent%E5%86%85%E6%A0%B8/08-%E6%A1%86%E6%9E%B6%E4%B8%8ESDK%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E4%BC%98%E5%85%88%E7%BA%A7.md): 查证基准：2026-07-11。这里的“暂不投入”是对“TypeScript + Node 主语言、先完成单 Agent L1、再渐进迁往 Rust 执行面”这条路线的排序，不是对项目质量的普遍评价。所有 SDK 和框架 API 在实施当天重新核对。

- [04 · 状态、记忆与压缩](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/05-%E4%B8%8A%E4%B8%8B%E6%96%87-%E7%9F%A5%E8%AF%86%E4%B8%8E%E8%AE%B0%E5%BF%86/04-%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81-%E8%AE%B0%E5%BF%86%E4%B8%8E%E5%8E%8B%E7%BC%A9.md)
- [01 · 工具契约与错误模型](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/06-%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7-%E5%8D%8F%E8%AE%AE%E4%B8%8E%E8%A1%8C%E5%8A%A8%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6/01-%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7%E5%A5%91%E7%BA%A6%E4%B8%8E%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B.md)

- [03 · MCP 与互操作协议](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/06-%E5%B7%A5%E5%85%B7-%E5%8D%8F%E8%AE%AE%E4%B8%8E%E8%A1%8C%E5%8A%A8%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6/03-MCP%E4%B8%8E%E4%BA%92%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E5%8D%8F%E8%AE%AE.md)

- [01 · Agent 威胁建模](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/07-%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%8E%E6%B2%BB%E7%90%86/01-Agent%E5%A8%81%E8%83%81%E5%BB%BA%E6%A8%A1.md)
- [02 · Prompt Injection 与不可信内容](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/07-%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%8E%E6%B2%BB%E7%90%86/02-Prompt-Injection%E4%B8%8E%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%BF%A1%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9.md)
- [03 · 最小权限、隐私与 Confused Deputy](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/07-%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%8E%E6%B2%BB%E7%90%86/03-%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90-%E9%9A%90%E7%A7%81%E4%B8%8EConfused-Deputy.md)
- [04 · 纵深防御与人类控制](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/07-%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%8E%E6%B2%BB%E7%90%86/04-%E7%BA%B5%E6%B7%B1%E9%98%B2%E5%BE%A1%E4%B8%8E%E4%BA%BA%E7%B1%BB%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6.md)
- [05 · Agent UX 与可控交互](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/07-%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E4%B8%8E%E6%B2%BB%E7%90%86/05-Agent-UX%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E6%8E%A7%E4%BA%A4%E4%BA%92.md)
- [01 · 失败分类、超时、重试与取消](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/08-%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%82%E6%B5%8B/01-%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB-%E8%B6%85%E6%97%B6-%E9%87%8D%E8%AF%95%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%96%E6%B6%88.md)
- [02 · 并发、背压与预算](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/08-%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%82%E6%B5%8B/02-%E5%B9%B6%E5%8F%91-%E8%83%8C%E5%8E%8B%E4%B8%8E%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97.md)
- [03 · 持久执行、Checkpoint 与 Exactly-Once](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/08-%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%82%E6%B5%8B/03-%E6%8C%81%E4%B9%85%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C-Checkpoint%E4%B8%8EExactly-Once.md): 本章是核心心智模型，但引入 durable workflow 引擎、多 Worker 恢复和长任务是 L1 之后 的实施项，不是首个 Agent 的前置依赖。
- [04 · Trace、SLO 与成本](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/08-%E5%8F%AF%E9%9D%A0%E6%80%A7%E4%B8%8E%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%82%E6%B5%8B/04-Trace-SLO%E4%B8%8E%E6%88%90%E6%9C%AC.md)
- [01 · Rust 迁移所需理论](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/09-Rust%E8%BF%81%E7%A7%BB%E7%90%86%E8%AE%BA-L1%E5%90%8E/01-Rust%E8%BF%81%E7%A7%BB%E6%89%80%E9%9C%80%E7%90%86%E8%AE%BA.md): 本模块全部属于 L1 之后。首个 Agent 仍以 TypeScript + Node 完成控制面、评测和运行时闭环；Rust 迁移只由测量到的资源、尾延迟、部署或隔离需求驱动。
- [02 · 跨语言契约与控制面/执行面](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/09-Rust%E8%BF%81%E7%A7%BB%E7%90%86%E8%AE%BA-L1%E5%90%8E/02-%E8%B7%A8%E8%AF%AD%E8%A8%80%E5%A5%91%E7%BA%A6%E4%B8%8E%E6%8E%A7%E5%88%B6%E9%9D%A2-%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E9%9D%A2.md): 本章是 L1 之后 的迁移理论，不计入首个 TypeScript + Node Agent 的毕业门禁。
- [01 · 综合系统心智模型](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/01-%E7%BB%BC%E5%90%88%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E5%BF%83%E6%99%BA%E6%A8%A1%E5%9E%8B.md)
- [02 · 动手前闭卷检查](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/02-%E5%8A%A8%E6%89%8B%E5%89%8D%E9%97%AD%E5%8D%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5.md): 总分 100。闭卷完成后再查看下一章，建议用时 150 分钟。这是“可开始第一个 TypeScript + Node Agent”的门禁，不考 durable engine、多 Agent 实现或 Rust 迁移；它们各有 L1 后独立门禁。
- [03 · 参考答案与评分](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/03-%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E7%AD%94%E6%A1%88%E4%B8%8E%E8%AF%84%E5%88%86.md)
- [04 · 八周理论学习计划](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/04-%E5%85%AB%E5%91%A8%E7%90%86%E8%AE%BA%E5%AD%A6%E4%B9%A0%E8%AE%A1%E5%88%92.md): 默认每周 8–12 小时：4–6 小时阅读，2–3 小时闭卷复述/画图，2–3 小时纸面微实验与产出。时间不足就延长周数，不压缩门禁。本计划的目标是获得“开始第一个 Agent 的理论资格”，不在理论期搭建生产系统。
- [05 · 一手资料索引](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/05-%E4%B8%80%E6%89%8B%E8%B5%84%E6%96%99%E7%B4%A2%E5%BC%95.md): 查证基准：2026-07-11。精读 表示阅读教材章节直接引用的定义、图、实验与限制，不是从头通读整篇论文/整本规范；查阅 表示实施时按需核对；延伸 和 L1 后 不属于首次动手门禁。
- [06 · 章节验收矩阵](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/06-%E7%AB%A0%E8%8A%82%E9%AA%8C%E6%94%B6%E7%9F%A9%E9%98%B5.md)
- [07 · Rust 迁移门禁（L1 后）](https://whatthehan.github.io/masterpiece-static-docs/10-%E6%AF%95%E4%B8%9A%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81/07-Rust%E8%BF%81%E7%A7%BB%E9%97%A8%E7%A6%81.md)
